race.name: Cyprus Gran Fondo
race.tagline: 3-day UCI Gran Fondo World Series qualifier in Mediterranean paradise

vitals.feed_zones: Multiple feeding zones per stage (water, fruit, carbs)

climate.description: Mediterranean spring: sunny, cool breezes, ideal cycling conditions

terrain.surface: Coastal roads, mountain climbs (4-9%), valleys, traditional villages
features: Coastal roads, mountain climbs (4-9%), valleys, traditional villages

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 77. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 73.

course_description.character:
3-day stage race from Pafos Castle Square:
- **Stage 1 (Fri 3 Apr)**: 28.6km ITT - uphill to 300m peak then descent
- **Stage 2 (Sat 09:00)**: 102km GF (15km neutral → 3 climbs: 8km@4%, 6.5km@6%, 13.5km@4.5% to 65km peak)
- **Stage 3 (Sun 08:00)**: 59km GF w/ 700m@9% climb + 45km medio shortcut[1][2]
suffering_zones: Stage 1 ITT: Full gas 28.6km uphill opening

logistics.transport: Paphos Int'l Airport (PFO) 15km. All stages start/finish Pafos Castle Square near 4-5* resorts (Annabelle, Almyra). Police escort, support cars (except ITT), multiple feed zones[1][2].

history.origin_story: 10th edition 2026 (~2016 origin). UCI Gran Fondo World Series partner since 2017. Attracts ex-pros like Olga Zabelinskaya + world champions[1][6].

biased_opinion.summary: Perfect spring cycling vacation with UCI Worlds qualification. Compact island delivers coast-to-mountain variety without extreme distance. Ideal for age-group racers seeking qualification + Instagram-worthy scenery.

final_verdict.one_liner: Strong T2 UCI stage race - qualification + tourism excellence

youtube_data.search_query: Cyprus Gran Fondo gran fondo cycling Paphos

videos.title: Gran Fondo Cyprus / The greatest amateur road cycling race in Cyprus!
videos.description:
The event will take during the first weekend of April 2023 for the ninth consecutive year and provides the perfect opportunity for recreational riders to qualify for the World Gran Fondo Championships held every year. All participants of Cyprus Gran Fondo will have the opportunity to earn their qualification in the Gran Fondo World Championship.

Starting every day next to the Mediterranean coast, you will climb some of the nicest mountains of the island and pass through traditional and rustic villages, enjoy the Cyprus weather and nature, before returning back to some of the best hotels in Paphos to enjoy your off-the-bike time!

Our idea is to bring passionate cyclists together, professional and amateurs riding shoulder to shoulder, to enjoy the amazing Cyprus nature and have fun in a relaxing and comfortable atmosphere. 
https://www.activatecyprus.com/gran-fondo-cyprus-2023

trial or road race in Glasgow in three
consecutive races in Cyprus here you get
the chance to ride in killer up hills
and great descents with Scenic and
amazing routes before the actual race we
have the opportunity to ride together in
the Recon camp where we ride along every
course and see all the details so you
can make your race tactics for race day
see you in Glasgow 2023

videos.title: CYPRUS GRAN FONDO / THE NEW ROUTE / ACTIVATE CYPRUS
videos.description:
The greatest amateur road cycling race in Cyprus!
since 2017, is featured among the biggest cycling events of the UCI as part of the Gran Fondo World Series for cyclists ranging from pros to beginners.
activatecyprus.com/gran-fondo-cyprus-2023

videos.curation_reason: Recent course preview with specific terrain details and rider feedback about the new route's difficulty and scenic views.

quotes.text: It's more difficult than previous year it was a very tough road today there are some steep climbs there are some long climbs the first part was like very challenging it's quite a steep uphill.
If you go on the top now you will see that it's much much better - it's full of flowers full of fruits fresh air.

key_challenges.name: Killer up hills
key_challenges.description: The course features challenging climbs that riders describe as killer up hills, followed by great descents.

terrain_notes.text: The area is described as full of flowers and fruits with fresh air, and the views become much better as you reach higher elevations on the climbs.

race_day_tips.text: Participate in the Recon camp before the actual race where you ride along every course and see all the details so you can make your race tactics for race day.

additional_quotes.text: UCI Ingram Fondo in paphos is one of the first races in the European calendar of grand fundos and it's a great opportunity as a season opener here you can get your first races your first fast miles on the legs

The event offers three different opportunities for qualification in the UCI ground fund over championships in Glasgow 2023 you can qualify for a time trial or road race in Glasgow in three consecutive races in Cyprus
It's beautiful this area here is full of flowers full of fruits fresh air fresh air if you go on the top now you will see that it's much much better

rider_intel.search_text: The UCI Cyprus Gran Fondo in Paphos serves as one of the first races in the European grand fondo calendar, making it an ideal season opener for riders seeking their first fast miles. The 63.4-mile course features what riders call killer up hills followed by great descents along scenic and amazing routes. The terrain is described as beautiful with fresh air, full of flowers and fruits, with views that improve significantly at higher elevations. International riders from various countries including Canada, Belgium, England, Sweden, Israel, Latvia, and America participate in this event. A pre-race reconnaissance camp is available where participants can ride the entire course to develop race tactics. The event offers qualification opportunities for the UCI Gran Fondo World Championships, with three different chances to qualify for time trial or road race events through consecutive races in Cyprus. Riders report completing the course in approximately two hours and describe the overall experience as brilliant with beautiful views throughout.
